caption: In a clinical simulation setting, a group of medical professionals in scrubs and masks respond to an emergency scenario. A person in pink scrubs and blue gloves stands by a medical cart, while others in dark blue or black clothing assist a patient lying on a white gurney. Some personnel wear face masks and gloves, and one individual holds a white clipboard. In the background, a door is visible alongside a logo that reads "RA SH UNIV". Across the bottom of the scene, a magenta banner displays the text "Day 3", "Code on Post OP Floor", and "Sim Week", accompanied by a small icon of a medical building. As the sequence progresses, a person in a black jacket moves across the foreground, partially obscuring the view, while the team continues to attend to the patient on the gurney.
